'''zafasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacko|wacko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacko|wacko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zafasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæfæsæth|zæfæsæth]] || [[word:zæfæsæj|zæfæsæj]] || [[word:zæfæsæsh|zæfæsæsh]] || [[word:zæfæsæ|zæfæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafafasath|zafafasath]] || [[word:zafafasaj|zafafasaj]] || [[word:zafafasash|zafafasash]] || [[word:zafafasa|zafafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafasath|zafasath]] || [[word:zafasaj|zafasaj]] || [[word:zafasash|zafasash]] || [[word:zafasa|zafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafafsath|zafafsath]] || [[word:zafafsaj|zafafsaj]] || [[word:zafafsash|zafafsash]] || [[word:zafafsaf|zafafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zafasatha|zafasatha]] || [[word:zafasaja|zafasaja]] || [[word:zafasasha|zafasasha]] || [[word:zafasaka|zafasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zafasath|zafasath]] || [[word:zafasaj|zafasaj]] || [[word:zafasash|zafasash]] || [[word:zafasa|zafasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zafasathal|zafasathal]] || [[word:zafasajal|zafasajal]] || [[word:zafasashal|zafasashal]] || [[word:zafasakal|zafasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zafasathatha|zafasathatha]] || [[word:zafasajaja|zafasajaja]] || [[word:zafasashasha|zafasashasha]] || [[word:zafasaka|zafasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zafasathan|zafasathan]] || [[word:zafasajan|zafasajan]] || [[word:zafasashan|zafasashan]] || [[word:zafasakan|zafasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zafasathaoro|zafasathaoro]] || [[word:zafasajaoro|zafasajaoro]] || [[word:zafasashaoro|zafasashaoro]] || [[word:zafasakaoro|zafasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
